caption: A woman with dark, shoulder-length hair and black-rimmed glasses is positioned centrally against a solid black background. She is wearing a light green, patterned tunic with a decorative embroidered neckline and a simple black necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her collar. In the lower left and center of the scene, a small logo featuring a circular emblem and the text "NPTEL" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking, her facial expressions and mouth movements shifting slightly as she talks. Her head remains relatively steady, and her gaze is directed forward toward the camera. The lighting is consistent, illuminating her face and clothing while leaving the backdrop completely dark. No other people or objects are present in the frame.
